Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.reasonerExtensionTests

Interface AbstractReasonerTests.IRulePatcher

Enclosing class:
AbstractReasonerTests
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public static interface AbstractReasonerTests.IRulePatcher
Protocol for modifying a proof rule for the replay tests. This allows to change the expected rule when performing normal and minimal replay tests. Indeed, it may happen that the reasoner does not produce the exact same rule when running with a smaller set of hypotheses.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IProofRule
    patchRule(IProofRule rule, IReasonerInput input)
    Returns the rule that should be produced during normal or minimal replay of the reasoners.

  • Method Details

    • patchRule

      IProofRule patchRule(IProofRule rule, IReasonerInput input)
      Returns the rule that should be produced during normal or minimal replay of the reasoners.
      Parameters:
      rule - the rule that was initially produced by the reasoner
      input - the input of the reasoner that produced the rule
      Returns:
      the rule that the reasoner should return when run with a reduced set of hypotheses.
